zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan於1373年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登時，她的父親Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan30歲，母親Mariota MacKay22歲。她於1389年與Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年9月在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan于1373年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登时，她的父亲Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan30岁，母亲Mariota MacKay22岁。她于1389年与Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年9月在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan was born in 1373, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan, was 30 and her mother, Mariota MacKay, was 22. She married Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland in 1389, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in September 1434, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan est née en 1373, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mariota MacKay, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland en 1389, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en septembre 1434, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan 1373 in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan 30 und ihre Mutter Mariota MacKay 22. Sie hat 1389 in Schottland, United Kingdom Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im September 1434 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan è nata il nel 1373 nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mariota MacKay, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland nel 1389, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel settembre 1434, nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchanが1373年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで生まれた時，父Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchanは30歳，母Mariota MacKayは22歳であった。1389年にイギリススコットランドでRobert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1434年9月にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan(이)가 1373년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariota MacKay(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 9월 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan nasceu em 1373, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mariota MacKay, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland em 1389, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1434, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan родилась в 1373 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariota MacKay, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland в 1389 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла сентябрь 1434 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Stewart of Buchan nació en 1373, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mariota MacKay, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert Sutherland 6th Earl of Sutherland en 1389, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en septiembre de 1434, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
